task:
A pre-seeded Zotero library is at /home/user/Zotero/zotero.sqlite, and a BibTeX file with two entries is at /home/user/Documents/citations.bib.

Import /home/user/Documents/citations.bib into the library. After import, both entries must exist as new items: one titled 'LLaMA: Open and Efficient Foundation Language Models' and one titled 'PaLM: Scaling Language Modeling with Pathways'. Leave Zotero running.
